commands.repair_reason: The remaining blocker is contributor-supplied real behavior proof plus maintainer review of the private staff CLI release path, not an automated repair task.; Cleared: No concrete security or supply-chain regression was found; the new package is private, uses the existing workspace dependency set, and adds only local TypeScript build scripts. (sha=7fb012c603688f852a21c15be0d6b50b02b232f1)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a private `@openclaw/clawhub-staff` workspace package, moves platform staff user/package commands into that binary, removes those commands from the public `clawhub` CLI/docs, and wires the new package into package CI, lint, and Knip coverage.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a feature/refactor PR rather than a bug report. Source inspection confirms current main still has the public staff command surface, so there is no current-main bug reproduction path to establish.
commands.review_followup: The remaining blocker is contributor-supplied real behavior proof plus maintainer review of the private staff CLI release path, not an automated repair task.

target.title: Split staff commands into private CLI
target.author: patrick-erichsen
